name: MulligansGolfClubNC
about: Mulligan's Golf Club is a golf simulator venue located in downtown Concord, North Carolina, just north of Charlotte. The facility features 4 private simulator bays equipped with Foresight Falcon technology, overhead launch monitors, and 2-hour rental sessions. It caters to golfers of all skill levels, offering the ability to play on hundreds of virtual courses, use a virtual driving range, or participate in scramble formats with friends. The club operates with a pay-per-bay model and also offers a monthly membership option.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight Falcon overhead launch monitor technology
2-hour bay rentals instead of the standard 1-hour
Downtown location near Charlotte with a welcoming atmosphere
On-site bar with TVs for watching sports
Option to work remotely while practicing

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with beer, wine, and spirits

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site bar with beer, wine, and spirits, as well as light snacks available for purchase. Bringing outside food and drink is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 2-hour bay rentals, you can typically play 9-18 holes depending on pace, as each hole usually takes about 10-15 minutes to complete.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as welcoming golfers of all skill levels, and its family-friendly amenities like TVs and food options make it suitable for kids.
